title: Preservation of ballots and returns
doc_html:
§1862.  Preservation of ballots and returns

The custodian of the archives or records of the board of commissioners ordering the election shall preserve, for a period of three months from the date of the promulgation of the election, the ballots and other returns thereof.
doc_text:
§1862.  Preservation of ballots and returns
The custodian of the archives or records of the board of commissioners ordering the election shall preserve, for a period of three months from the date of the promulgation of the election, the ballots and other returns thereof.
